The Fike Shway Brand Reference is saved at `docs/fike-shway-brand-reference.md` in the project root.

Apply this reference to ALL generated content (captions, blog posts, emails, ad copy, reports).

**Core tone:** Confident authority, action-oriented, direct and punchy, results-obsessed (ROI/phone calls/leads — never vanity me
